query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alert_escalation_rules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  from_severity ENUM('info', 'warning') NOT NULL,
  to_severity ENUM('warning', 'critical') NOT NULL,
  hours_until_escalation INT NOT NULL,
  notify_on_escalation BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  notify_roles JSON,
  notify_emails JSON,
  applies_to_departments JSON,
  applies_to_alert_types JSON,
  is_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  from_severity ENUM('info', 'warning') NOT NULL,
  to_severity ENUM('warning', 'critical') NOT NULL,
  hours_until_escalation INT NOT NULL,
  notify_on_escalation BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  notify_roles JSON,
  notify_emails JSON,
  applies_to_departments JSON,
  applies_to_alert_types JSON,
  is_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
